compiled_state.title: As a practitioner, I can reference a shared bug report template so agents have a consistent format to follow
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Done Definitions

- bug-report-template.md exists at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/ with Required sections (Expected Behavior, Actual Behavior) and Optional sections (Technical Environment, Action History and Workarounds, Logs, Additional Details)
- Logs section includes 30K truncation guidance with ticket comment overflow instruction
- Template specifies structured title format [Component]: [Condition] -> [Observed Result] with component hierarchy (Tool/Skill -> File/Path -> Logical Workflow)
- Template incorporates Zero Inference rule (no root cause speculation, no hindsight bias, no forced debugging, no low-value tickets)

## Scope

In: Template file creation with all required and optional sections, title format spec, Zero Inference rule, 30K guidance.
Out: CLI validation, skill creation, test creation.

## Escalation Policy

Autonomous — Agents proceed with best judgment at all times. Reasonable assumptions are made and documented. No escalation for uncertainty.

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bug-report-template.md exists at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md
- [ ] Template contains Required section with Expected Behavior header
  Verify: grep -qi 'Expected Behavior' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md
- [ ] Template contains Required section with Actual Behavior header
  Verify: grep -qi 'Actual Behavior' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md
- [ ] Template contains Optional sections (Technical Environment, Action History, Logs, Additional Details)
  Verify: grep -qi 'Technical Environment' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md && grep -qi 'Logs' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md
- [ ] Logs section includes 30K truncation guidance
  Verify: grep -qi '30' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md
- [ ] Template specifies title format [Component]: [Condition] -> [Observed Result]
  Verify: grep -q 'Component.*Condition.*Observed Result\|Component.*Condition.*Result' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md
- [ ] Template includes Zero Inference rule
  Verify: grep -qi 'Zero Inference\|no root cause speculation' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: none (new file); exemplars read: value-effort-scorer.md, prior-art-search.md) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — static asset) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: Shared bug report template created at plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md with all required/optional sections, Zero Inference rule, title format, and 30K truncation guidance.
comments.author: Main
